faqs.question: Is Text Case Converter really free?
faqs.answer: Yes! Every feature of Text Case Converter on DevToolKit is 100% free with no hidden charges, trials, or subscriptions.

faqs.question: Do you store or look at my inputs?
faqs.answer: Never. All inputs, text, files, and outputs are handled locally inside your web client. We value privacy and store nothing on our backend.

faqs.question: Does it work on mobile phones?
faqs.answer: Yes, our user interface is designed responsively to adapt perfectly to mobile screens and browsers.

faqs.question: How accurate is the Text Case Converter?
faqs.answer: It is highly accurate. Applies standard Unicode casing rules.

faqs.question: Are there any usage limits?
faqs.answer: No, you can run conversions, validations, or generation tasks as many times as you like. No text size limit.

faqs.question: Do I need to download desktop software?
faqs.answer: No install required. Text Case Converter is built purely with web standards and runs live inside your browser.

faqs.question: Is there a file upload size limit?
How can I report a bug or request a feature?
